name: SPLENIC HAMARTOMA
definition: SPLENOMA rare typically single nonneoplastic lesion composed of a mixture of normal splenic elements
dominant_finding: attenuation equal to / hypodense to splenic tissue
distribution: attenuation equal to / hypodense to splenic tissue
discriminating_features: attenuation equal to / hypodense to splenic tissue
diffuse heterogeneous enhancement, more homogeneous on delayed images

CT: attenuation equal to / hypodense to splenic tissue
MR: diffuse heterogeneous enhancement, more homogeneous on delayed images
